title: BEM-917 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM917_UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_TELEGRAM_GD_REPORTS.md with content # BEM-917 UNIFIED PROTOCOL TELEGRAM GD REPORTS
Status: UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_WITH_GD_TELEGRAM_AND_CANON_REPORTS
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: update the unified BEM-916 system improvement protocol with operator remarks about Telegram routing, report interval and canonical report format.
Correction scope:
- BEM-917 does not create a separate Telegram protocol.
- BEM-917 updates the unified BEM-916 protocol.
- Telegram Operator Interface remains an integrated phase of the system improvement protocol.
Worker agreement:
- Request: governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM917_UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_TELEGRAM_GD_REPORTS_REQUEST.md
- Worker review: governance/audit/internal/results/BEM917_WORKER_TELEGRAM_GD_REPORTS_REVIEW.md
- Curator response: governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM917_UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_TELEGRAM_GD_REPORTS_RESPONSE.md
Operator remarks implemented:
1. Telegram default target is General Director object OBJ-GD-001 through General Director Curator EL-CUR-GD-001.
2. Reports are delivered with operator-selected periodicity. Default: 1 hour. Operator may change via /report_interval or /settings.
3. Telegram reports must follow reporting canon: BEM header, date/time UTC+3, stage progress, roadmap progress, checklist with proofs, table with name/description/rationale and next action.
Protocol notes:
- Telegram entry point is General Director level. GD Curator classifies and routes routine tasks to Director/Worker through policy gate.
- Outgoing reports are delivered to operator through General Director channel, even when source content is Curator or Director report.
- Setting report interval is allowed, but enabling schedule trigger remains an operator gate.
Operator gates:
- bot token/secrets;
- production webhook mutation;
- schedule trigger activation;
- issue #31 writes;
- always-on daemon;
- real pilot/client/scope/metrics;
- LLM-agent runtime model.
Local operator artifacts:
- BEM917_unified_system_improvement_protocol_gd_telegram_ru.docx
- BEM917_unified_system_improvement_protocol_gd_telegram_ru.zip
QA: DOCX rendered to 3 pages, no edge clipping detected.
